body:
# Minecraft But Chickens are OP

It's Minecraft But Chickens Drop OP Items when they are Killed. There are many OP Items...

## Running the Pack
To run the pack, just add this pack to your world's Datapack folder, then join the game and kill some chickens.

## Info
If you are using this Datapack in a YouTube video, credit me for making the pack.

**Discord Server**: [discord.gg/TcNAvN2Ay5](https://discord.gg/TcNAvN2Ay5)
